Name: Delete message
Description: The delete message displays an appropriate message to allow the user to understand the consequences of delete the object or configuration.
Content Rules: The message should not be longer than 140 characters.

Name: Delete CTA button
Description: The delete CTA will execute the delete action

Name: Cancel button
Description: The cancel button will close the modal and cancel the delete action.

Name: Delete caution alert message
Description: In some cases the object or configuration that is being deleted will have dependencies. The type and number of dependencies will be displayed in this warning message.
Dynamic Behavior: In some cases the actual number of things like answers and liveboards effected will be displayed in the warning message.
Content Rules: The message should not be longer than 140 characters.

Name: Reconfirmation field
Description: In some cases the object or configuration that is being deleted will have dependencies. This may require a reconfirmation field. The user will have to reenter their account password to delete an object or configuration.
Dynamic Behavior: This is required field when used and the user will not be able to delete the object or configuration without entering their password.
Error State: If the users enters an incorrect password for their account an error message will be displayed in the header of the field.
